CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. The Buyer's contract sales price from item 101 on the HUD-1. If this is related to a seller with a Service File, use the Sync Buyer/Seller Data to auto-fill the Contract Sales Price.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Buyer's contract sales price from item 101 on the HUD-1. If this is related to a seller with a Service File, use the Sync Buyer/Seller Data to auto-fill the Contract Sales Price.
CustomField.label: Purchase Price
